introSection: Worm Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was last known to be operating in 2012. It was removed by 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
The layout of this roller coaster is essentially the Wacky Worm layout. However it is more spread out, and the track does not travel above other track at any point during the ride. A large apple is present, however the train only passes through it once per lap.

This roller coaster has typical Italian-style track but different supports.

fullText:
Worm Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Beijing Shijingshan Amusement Park in Shijingshan, Beijing, China. It was last known to be operating in 2012. It was removed by 2015.

The layout of this roller coaster is essentially the Wacky Worm layout. However it is more spread out, and the track does not travel above other track at any point during the ride. A large apple is present, however the train only passes through it once per lap.

This roller coaster has typical Italian-style track but different supports.
